data.title: HomeServices of America Launches ‘OnePoint,’ an All-In-One Real Estate Solution, Delivering a Seamless Client Experience Across the Company’s Core Services
data.description: In Minneapolis, HomeServices of America has launched OnePoint to cater to the evolving needs of residential real estate consumers. This new offering aims to provide a consolidated experience for buyers and sellers by combining essential services in one platform. As the nation's leading provider of homeownership services, HomeServices is responding to the increasing demand for a seamless end-to-end process in the real estate sector. OnePoint allows HomeServices' local operating companies to offer a cohesive suite of services to customers, enhancing their overall experience.

data.title: Unparalleled Sky‑High Views at Avra Metropolitan Set a New Standard in Naples, Florida Living
data.description: In Naples, Florida, a new high-rise condominium community named Avra at Metropolitan Naples has been gaining acclaim for its unparalleled views that are unmatched by any other building in Southwest Florida. Situated in a prime location, residents can enjoy breathtaking sights of the gulf and the city of Naples. This development is poised to become a sought-after living space due to its exceptional vistas.

data.title: Legit Security (VibeGuard) Named a Sample Vendor in Gartner® Report: “Best Practices to Mitigate Security Risks with Agentic Coding Tools”
data.description: Legit Security, a prominent autonomous software security provider based in Boston, revealed that its VibeGuard product has been recognized as a Sample Vendor in the Gartner Report titled "Best Practices to Mitigate Security Risks with Agentic Coding Tools." According to Liav Caspi, Legit's CTO and co-founder, the increasing role of AI in generating vast amounts of code rapidly has outpaced traditional application security methods. VibeGuard was specifically designed to address this challenge, allowing organizations to keep up with the rapid pace of AI-generated coding.

data.title: Osaic Adds AI-Powered Documentation Platform Scribe to Its Technology Ecosystem
data.description: Osaic, Inc. based in Scottsdale, Arizona, a leading provider of wealth management strategies, recently integrated Scribe, an AI-powered documentation platform, into its technology ecosystem. This addition offers Osaic advisors a tool to streamline workflows effectively. With Scribe, advisors can document processes automatically in real-time, enhancing efficiency in their operations. By adopting this solution, advisors and their teams can improve and standardize their workflows across their businesses.

data.title: CapIntel Brings Tax Impact Into the Investment Proposal Process
data.description: In Toronto, CapIntel introduced a new tax analysis feature as part of their financial technology solutions. This feature allows financial advisors to assess and communicate the tax implications of portfolio adjustments directly within the proposal process. With this built-in capability, advisors no longer need to depend on separate tools or disjointed workflows for tax evaluations. The launch addresses the increasing demands faced by advisors.

data.title: Middlefield ActivEnergy Dividend Class ETF Series Distributions
data.description: On April 23, 2026, the Middlefield ActivEnergy Dividend Class ETF Series (TSX: MAEC) revealed that distributions for Q2 2026 will be disbursed to unitholders of the fund. The payment will be made according to a structured plan.

data.title: Fi-Tek LLC and InspereX Announce Strategic Partnership to Advance Fixed Income Trading Capabilities
data.description: An important strategic partnership was revealed today between two major players in the financial technology industry. Fi-Tek LLC, a renowned provider of wealth technology solutions, and InspereX, a tech-focused distributor of fixed income, structured products, ETFs, and alternative investments, have joined forces. This collaboration, announced on April 23, 2026, aims to revolutionize the sector. The partnership is highly anticipated as it combines Fi-Tek's expertise with InspereX's innovative approach. This move is expected to have a significant impact on the industry, with both companies bringing a wealth of experience to the table.

data.title: OneLayer Launches Sentry Partner Program to Extend Zero Trust Security for Private Cellular Networks
data.description: Leading private wireless and security integrators are now certified by a program to provide Zero Trust network access security, automated device onboarding, and managed services on a large scale. The certification was announced in Boston on April 23, 2026. OneLayer, a prominent player in private LTE/5G asset management and Zero Trust technology, is spearheading this initiative, ensuring unparalleled cybersecurity measures for users.
S.KOREA AND VIETNAM SIGN 73 MEMORANDA OF UNDERSTANDING ON AREAS INCLUDING NUCLEAR ENERGY, ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY, INFRASTRUCTURE - S.KOREA INDUSTRY MINISTRY

data.title: MetricStream Announces GRC Summit London 2026: Tech Columnist Parmy Olson to Keynote Flagship Event on AI and Resilience
data.description: The GRC Summit London 2026 by MetricStream in San Jose, California, brings together risk and compliance leaders to explore the intersection of AI and resilience. The event highlights keynote speaker Parmy Olson and aims to unite industry professionals to discuss the latest trends and strategies in governance, risk management, and compliance.

data.title: InMarket Announces Partnership for Real-Time, Visit-Based Optimization Solution with Yahoo DSP
data.description: InMarket, a top provider of real-time marketing and measurement services, has recently partnered with Yahoo DSP, a versatile omnichannel programmatic platform. This partnership aims to enhance value for brands and agencies by offering greater flexibility. As part of the collaboration, advertisers utilizing Yahoo DSP in the United States and Canada will have access to InMarket's measurement solution. This tool enables advertisers to more accurately assess the impact of their media campaigns across various platforms, particularly in driving real-world conversions.

data.title: Xometry to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Xometry, Inc., a leading AI-native marketplace facilitating connections between buyers and suppliers of custom manufacturing worldwide, revealed its plan to release financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026, before the market commences trading. Traded as XMTR on the NASDAQ exchange, the company operates from North Bethesda, Md. Stay updated for key figures on May 7th.

data.title: Arintra Receives A+* Partnership Rating in KLAS Emerging Company Spotlight Report
data.description: In San Francisco, Arintra, a GenAI-native autonomous medical coding platform serving health systems and physician groups, revealed the release of a KLAS Emerging Company Spotlight report reflecting customer feedback on their platform. The report confirms that customers opted for Arintra due to its vision and transparency, witnessing tangible outcomes, and showing long-term dedication. Titled Arintra Autonomous Medical Coding 2026, the report draws on interviews with Arintra customers to highlight positive experiences with the platform.
AMERICAN AIR WILL BE ON FOREFRONT OF M&A IF OPPORTUNITIES ARISE

data.title: Factorial Names Dr. Dieter Zetsche to Board of Directors, Bringing World-Class Leadership to Its Commercial Scale and Public Market Journey
data.description: Factorial Inc., a prominent player in solid-state battery technology, revealed that Dr. Dieter Zetsche will be joining the Board of Directors of the merged entity following the finalization of its business merger with Cartesian Growth Corporation III. Dr. Zetsche, who has been an early investor and valued consultant to Factorial since 2021, will bring his expertise to the Board. This move represents a key transition for the company, highlighting Dr. Zetsche's integral role in its growth and development.

data.title: MINISO Group Chairman Proposes to Increase Shareholding
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Guangzhou, China, MINISO Group Holding Limited disclosed valuable information. This globally renowned high-growth value retailer, known for its trendy lifestyle products with unique IP designs, confirmed the news. The Company, listed on NYSE as MNSO and on HKEX as 9896, shared the announcement.

data.title: NCCN Announces Awards for Improvement Initiatives for Chronic Myeloid Leukemia (CML)
data.description: The National Comprehensive Cancer Network recently approved funding for specific quality improvement research initiatives aimed at utilizing digital tools to enhance decision-making processes and improve the quality of life for individuals living with Chronic Myeloid Leukemia (CML). This announcement was made in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania on April 23, 2026. The project supports innovative efforts to transform care and was selected to receive an undisclosed sum to carry out these essential research endeavors.

data.title: The Park in Berkeley Heights Secures Lease with Montclair Restaurant Boschetto for Second Location
data.description: A well-known restaurant recognized for its high-quality food in a relaxed atmosphere has introduced a new upscale dining location on the premises in BERKELEY HEIGHTS, N.J., as of April 23, 2026. The Park, a mixed-use campus spanning 185 acres in Berkeley Heights, New Jersey, unveiled the latest addition to its culinary offerings.

data.title: Alpha Tau Announces FDA Approval of IDE Supplement to Expand Alpha DaRT® IMPACT Trial to Patients with Pancreatic Cancer Receiving Gemcitabine with Abraxane® (Nab-Paclitaxel)
data.description: An FDA approval of an Investigational Device Exemption (IDE) supplement has been announced by Alpha Tau. The approval allows for the expansion of the Alpha DaRT® IMPACT trial to include patients with pancreatic cancer undergoing treatment with gemcitabine and Abraxane. This development marks a significant milestone in the trial, which aims to assess the effectiveness of Alpha DaRT® in treating pancreatic cancer. The decision to include patients receiving this specific chemotherapy regimen is expected to broaden the scope of the trial and potentially enhance the understanding of Alpha DaRT®'s impact.
